## Summary

**Root cause:** `MAX_SYMBOL_ROWS = 12` hard-capped symbol payoff entries, dropping core symbols from the ledger. Sort only used `traced` boolean, ignoring narrative span and character connections. Object layer builder didn't pass `symbolic_function_stages` to the renderer.

**Fix:**
- Raise `MAX_SYMBOL_ROWS` from 12 → 30 so core symbols survive the cap
- Better prioritization sort: traced first → wider chunk span → more attached characters
- Object layer builder passes `symbolic_function_stages` and `narrative_span` to renderer
- Prompt: expanded object categories (clothing, food, documents) + structured function taxonomy (identity marker, freedom symbol, confinement symbol, desire marker, etc.)
- Renderer: displays symbolic lifecycle stages with chapter ranges, narrative span indicator

## Scope

**Touches:**
- `lib/evaluation/pipeline/characterReducer.ts` — cap raise, improved sort
- `lib/evaluation/pipeline/prompts/pass1a-character-sweep.ts` — expanded object taxonomy + function labels
- `lib/evaluation/phase1a/buildStoryLayerFromLedger.ts` — passes symbolic_function_stages and narrative_span
- `components/ledger/StoryLedgerLayers.tsx` — renders lifecycle stages + span indicator

**Does NOT touch:**
- No role taxonomy changes (A1)
- No POV changes (A2)
- No relationship changes (A3)
- No scoring, report renderer, or Revise workbench changes

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Cap raise from 12→30 increases data volume but well within pipeline budget
- Sort change is strictly better: traced symbols still come first, tie-breaking now uses narrative significance instead of arbitrary order
- Backward compatible: old data without `symbolic_function_stages` renders identically

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: N/A — changes symbol prioritization within existing Phase 1A reducer. No new pipeline stages.
